nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘When you cross over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When you pass over the Jordan into the land of Canaan,

cnv.text: “你要吩咐以色列說：‘你們過約旦河到了迦南地的時候，

ccb.text: “你告诉以色列人，‘你们过约旦河进了迦南以后，
